concerns.text: FR-013 requires JaCoText model for Java code generation, but no task implements JaCoText. T018 only covers StarCoder for Python. Plan acknowledges JaCoText has NO verified source, yet FR-013 remains in spec without corresponding task coverage.

Plan.md and data-model.md define Session entity (Participant, Session, Problem, Submission, Metric), but no task explicitly creates Session table/model. T004 creates Participant, Problem, Submission, Metric tables; Session is missing from database schema and model implementation.

FR-001 requires problem loading from HumanEval/Codeforces. T012 sources HumanEval from HuggingFace and Codeforces from UCI/datasets, but Constitution VI mandates official repositories (GitHub for HumanEval, public Codeforces API). Task exists but does not satisfy FR-001 per Constitution.

Constitution II (Verified Accuracy Gate) and Governance require Reference-Validator Agent and Advancement-Evaluator Agent implementation. No tasks exist for these constitution-mandated agents despite their blocking gate status.
